name: Troubleshooting POS performance and speed issues
body: [{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Troubleshooting POS performance and speed issues"}], "data-id": "troubleshooting-pos-performance-and-speed-issues"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you're finding your system is performing slower than normal, Retail Express offers a handy troubleshooting guide. The guide is designed to step you through a series of checks to ensure there isn't anything on your network potentially impacting on the performance of your system."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The guide is broken into two sections:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Basic troubleshooting, which can be performed by staff confident with using computers"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Advanced troubleshooting, recommended for IT professionals and technicians."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.retailexpressmedia.com%2Fdocuments%2Fsupport%2FPOSPerformanceTroubleshooting.docx", "children": [{"text": "Download POS Performance Troubleshooting Guide"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Need more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Hardware-and-Software-System-Requirements", "children": [{"text": "Hardware - System Requirements, Supported POS Terminals and Operating Systems"}]}]}]}]}]
